report_name: AI-Powered Cyberattacks 'Months Away,' Five Eyes Intelligence Alliance Warns

identities.name: Five Eyes
identities.description: An intelligence alliance comprising the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand that issued a joint advisory on the threat of AI-powered cyberattacks.

identities.name: United States
identities.description: A member of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: United Kingdom
identities.description: A member of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: Canada
identities.description: A member of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: Australia
identities.description: A member of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: New Zealand
identities.description: A member of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: National Security Agency
identities.description: US intelligence agency, part of the Five Eyes, that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency
identities.description: US cybersecurity agency, part of the Five Eyes, that co-authored the advisory on AI-powered cyber threats.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: An AI company whose advanced models were mentioned as being blocked from foreign access by the US administration on national security grounds.

indicators.name: Anomalous API Calls to Public AI Services
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous API Calls to Public AI Services
id: f1a2b3c4-d5e6-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects an unusually high volume of API calls to public AI services from internal servers, which could indicate reconnaissance or data exfiltration using AI models. This rule should be tuned to exclude legitimate developer workstations or build servers.
references:
  - https://www.computing.co.uk/news/2026/security/ai-powered-cyberattacks-could-arrive-within-months-five-eyes-agencies-warn
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-23
tags:
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Initiated: true
    DestinationHostname|endswith:
      - 'api.openai.com'
      - 'api.anthropic.com'
      - 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com'
      - 'ai.google.com'
  filter_dev:
    Image|contains:
      - '\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\'
      - '\Windows\System32\curl.exe'
  condition: selection and not filter_dev
indicators.description: Detects an unusually high volume of API calls to public AI services from internal servers, which could indicate reconnaissance or data exfiltration using AI models.

indicators.name: PowerShell Execution with Long Encoded Command
indicators.pattern:
title: PowerShell Execution with Long Encoded Command
id: a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of PowerShell with a long, encoded command, a pattern that could be used by AI-generated polymorphic scripts to evade detection.
references:
  - https://www.computing.co.uk/news/2026/security/ai-powered-cyberattacks-could-arrive-within-months-five-eyes-agencies-warn
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-23
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|re: '-(e|en|enc|encode|encodedcommand)\s+[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of PowerShell with a long, encoded command, a pattern that could be used by AI-generated polymorphic scripts to evade detection.

indicators.name: Logon Failure Indicative of Password Spraying
indicators.pattern:
title: Logon Failure Indicative of Password Spraying
id: b2c3d4e5-f6a7-4b8c-9d0e-1f2a3b4c5d6e
status: experimental
description: Detects a single logon failure event that is characteristic of a password spraying attack. High numbers of these events from a single source or against a single user from many sources should be investigated as a potential AI-automated attack.
references:
  - https://www.computing.co.uk/news/2026/security/ai-powered-cyberattacks-could-arrive-within-months-five-eyes-agencies-warn
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-23
tags:
  - attack.t1110.003
  - attack.credential_access
level: low
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4625
    FailureReason|contains: 'Unknown user name or bad password'
    LogonType: 3
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects patterns indicative of password spraying, such as high-frequency failed login attempts from a distributed range of IP addresses, a task easily automated by AI.

indicators.name: Potential AI-Generated Phishing URL
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential AI-Generated Phishing URL
id: c3d4e5f6-a7b8-4c9d-0e1f-2a3b4c5d6e7f
status: experimental
description: Detects URL patterns that may be indicative of AI-generated phishing sites, which often use highly convincing but suspicious domain names.
references:
  - https://www.computing.co.uk/news/2026/security/ai-powered-cyberattacks-could-arrive-within-months-five-eyes-agencies-warn
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-23
tags:
  - attack.t1566.002
  - attack.initial_access
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains:
      - '/login'
      - '/auth'
      - '/verify'
      - '/account'
  keywords:
    c-uri|contains:
      - 'secure'
      - 'support'
      - 'update'
      - 'service'
      - 'portal'
  filter:
    cs-host|endswith:
      - '.microsoft.com'
      - '.google.com'
      - '.apple.com'
      - '.facebook.com'
      - '.windows.net'
  condition: selection and keywords and not filter
indicators.description: Detects access to URLs with characteristics of AI-generated phishing, such as perfect grammar and context, hosted on newly registered or lookalike domains.
